member.name: T:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.AlephInitPriority
member.summary: The priority of a service to be initialized by Aleph.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.IAlephAble
member.summary: A Service which is IAlephAble will be initialized by Aleph during INIT.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.IAlephAble.GetAlephFilesRegEx
member.summary: ***** This method will be removed in a future version. Please use GetConfigurationFileInfo instead. **** Returns a RegEx pattern describes the required input files for the Service.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.IAlephAble.GetAlephInitPriority
member.summary: Returns the INIT priority requested by the Service.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.IAlephAble.AlephInit(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initialize method of the Service to be called by Aleph.
member.param: The list of the input files for the Service.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IAlephAble.IAlephAble.GetConfigurationFilesInfo
member.summary: Returns a dictionary with the regex of the file and the schema file to validate. A service can have multiple files (with unique regex) with different/same schema file. Key = regex value, Value = json schema file to validate.
member.returns: Collection of regex and the associated schema file to validate.
